title: Newton-Raphson (NR) Method Optimization Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the Newton-Raphson method for finding a local minimum of a convex function by leveraging second-order derivative information.
relationships: Process flows sequentially from Start, through iterative computation of gradient and Hessian, solving the Newton equation for the step direction, updating the solution, and checking for convergence before either looping back or ending.
